projects.desc: Ravex-Tech Admin Panel is a powerful and user-friendly administrative dashboard designed to manage and monitor the Ravex-Tech e-commerce platform efficiently. The admin panel provides complete control over products, orders, customers, inventory, and website operations through a centralized interface. It is built to simplify store management while maintaining a clean, responsive, and professional user experience.

projects.desc: Ravex-Tech is a modern and responsive e-commerce web application designed for selling gaming peripherals and computer accessories online. The platform provides users with a seamless shopping experience, allowing them to browse, search, and purchase a wide range of products, including gaming keyboards, mice, headsets, mouse pads, and other gaming accessories. The project focuses on delivering an attractive user interface, smooth navigation, and a user-friendly shopping experience.
projects.features: Modern and responsive user interface,Product listing with detailed information,Search and filter functionality,Category-based product browsing,Shopping cart management system,Secure checkout interface,User authentication and account management,Product image gallery,Dark mode and attractive UI design,Mobile-friendly and cross-platform responsive layout,Wishlist and favorite products support,Admin panel for product management (optional),Fast loading performance and optimized design

projects.desc: Astra AI is a modern, full-stack AI-powered web application designed to provide an intelligent and interactive user experience through advanced conversational AI and multimedia generation capabilities. Developed independently as a solo project, Astra AI combines multiple AI technologies into a single, user-friendly platform.  The platform offers real-time AI chat assistance, AI image generation, user authentication, chat history management, and file processing features within a clean and responsive interface. Astra AI is built with a focus on performance, accessibility, and scalability, making it suitable for both personal and commercial applications.
projects.features: AI-powered conversational assistant, AI image generation capabilities, Secure user authentication and account management, Persistent chat history and session management, File upload and processing support, Multiple AI model integration, Responsive dark/light mode user interface, Modern dashboard and administration features, Real-time interaction and optimized performance, Scalable architecture for future enhancements,
projects.tech: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, Python Backend, Firebase Authentication, AI APIs and Model Integrations, Netlify Deployment, Modern Web Technologies and REST APIs,
projects.title: Astra-AI
